title: Analytics - Product Support Opened
scenario: Verify that opening the Product Support page logs a "product_support_opened" event and that event count increases after navigating to Support > Product Support on mobile.
steps: Open the Product Support page in Firebase.
Confirm default elements are present: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment.
On mobile, navigate to Support > Product Support.
Check that the event count for 'product_support_opened' has increased.
expected: The event "product_support_opened" is logged when the Product Support page is opened. Default elements (graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment) are present in Firebase. The event count increases after a few hours on mobile.
